Collier County Home Loans

FHA loans in Collier County, Florida

Collier County, anchored by affluent Naples and Marco Island, is one of Florida's most expensive markets — and a designated high-cost county, so its FHA limit is $764,750 for 2026, above the statewide floor. Much of the luxury coastal inventory still exceeds FHA limits, but the program is genuinely workable in the county's more affordable inland communities and on condos. The key is knowing where FHA fits.

Collier County FHA limit (1-unit)$764,750

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Collier County

Collier County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $764,750 — above the $541,287 statewide floor — giving you more borrowing room than most of Florida. Because published figures vary for high-cost counties, we confirm Collier County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup before you shop. Even with the higher limit, much of Collier's luxury market exceeds it — FHA buyers focus on condos and more affordable inland communities like Golden Gate and Immokalee.

Where FHA fits in high-cost Collier County

Naples and Marco Island luxury homes are largely beyond FHA's reach, but inland communities — Golden Gate, Immokalee, and parts of east Naples — offer homes within the FHA limit, and condos are workable when the building is FHA-approved or qualifies for Single-Unit Approval (see our condo guide). We confirm Collier County's exact figure with HUD before you shop.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Collier County

We help FHA buyers throughout Collier County, including Naples, Marco Island, Golden Gate, and Immokalee. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Naples

Down payment help in Collier County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Collier County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Collier County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Collier County for 2026?+
Collier is a designated high-cost county, so its 2026 FHA limit is $764,750, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I really use FHA in expensive Naples?+
Yes, in the right segments. Much of the luxury market exceeds FHA limits, but FHA works on condos and in more affordable inland communities like Golden Gate and Immokalee.
Where is FHA most workable in Collier County?+
In inland communities (Golden Gate, Immokalee, east Naples) and FHA-approved condos, rather than luxury coastal homes.
How much down payment do I need in Collier County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits help in a higher-priced market.
Do you serve all of Collier County?+
Yes — Naples, Marco Island, Golden Gate, Immokalee, and every community in the county.
